Az eszköz vezeték nélkül működik, rádiójelekkel továbbítja az adatokat, és lehetővé teszi az idő és hőmérséklet kivetítését a falra vagy a mennyezetre. items.raw_desc: Hibakód olvasó ANCEL AD410 OBD-II:The ANCEL AD410 is a professional OBD2 diagnostic scanner that offers a range of advanced features and benefits for easy and efficient vehicle diagnostics. One of the greatest strengths of this device is the 2.4-inch HD colour display with 262,000 colour resolution, which provides a clear and easy-to-read display of test results. The display is equipped with high-sensitivity silicone buttons with fast response, ensuring easy and intuitive operation. Another important feature of the AD410 scanner is its high performance and speed. It is equipped with a 32-bit STM processor, which is characterized by stable operation and lightning-fast response time of up to 3 seconds. This makes diagnostics with the device a breeze and can be handled even by a less experienced user. Simply connect the scanner to the vehicle's diagnostic socket and start testing.
